reviews.comment:
Voy hace más de 30 años y desde hace un tiempo el café es espantoso, no sé que pasó

(Translated by Google)
I've been going for more than 30 years and for a while now the coffee has been horrible, I don't know what happened
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOWNlR1pnEAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar donde está la estación está bueno. Tiene parque y sombra. Pero la gente que atiende es de terror! Uno peor que otro! Parece que te hacen un favor en atenderte. Una lástima

(Translated by Google)
The station is nice. It has a park and shade. But the people serving you are terrifying! One is worse than the other! It seems like they're doing you a favor by serving you. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoc2NueERBEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo los que andan en la ruta, entienden lo que es encontrar un lugar. Prolijo. Limpio y ordenado, donde reponer energías. Felicitaciones!!

(Translated by Google)
Only those who travel the road understand what it's like to find a place—neat, clean, and organized—where you can recharge. Congratulations!

reviews.comment:
Lo más rescatable es la limpieza de los baños. Pedimos un cortado con una medialunA incomible de lo dura. Empeoró notablemente la calidad de las cosas.

(Translated by Google)
The most notable thing is the cleanliness of the bathrooms. We ordered a cortado with a croissant that was inedible because it was so hard. The quality of the food has deteriorated significantly.
